series_metadata.series_description: Record consists of a State of Ohio identification card application (BMV 2002)and any supporting documentation in accordance with section 4507.50 thru 4507.52 of the ORC.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper records that are not microfilmed for 7 years, then destroy. Retain paper records that are microfilmed for 2 years, then destroy. ; Microform: ID card applications issued prior to implementation of Print On Demand (POD) shall be retained for seven (7) years. As POD process progresses all microfilm will eventually be destroyed. ; Electronic: At the time application is made to obtain a drivers license, using print on demand, the information, including signatures, shall be captured and stored electronically. Electronic files shall be retained for a period of eight (8) years, and then purged., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
